teaching.concept: Inline code sets apart a short item such as text to type, a key, a file name, or a command.
teaching.howTo: Wrap the item with one backtick on each side.

candidates.title: Inline code
candidates.prompt: Write the short note with one item as inline code.

matchChecks.feedback: Wrap at least one meaningful item in backticks.

editorialChecks.review: Keep inline code focused on one short item in this note.

hints: The marked item has a matching symbol on both sides.
Type one backtick, the item, then one more backtick.
Example: ``Open `notes.txt`.``
